_meta.description: Hand-graded (profile, listing) pairs for ranking prompt regression testing.
_meta.scoring_guide: score_min/score_max define the acceptable range. MAE gate: avg |predicted - midpoint| <= 8.

cases.description: Perfect match — exact make/model, low mileage, single owner mentioned

profile.free_text_criteria: single owner, no accidents, full service history
